title: Magic and Dungeons
description: This modpack adds a fantasy world with dungeons. Explore the world.
body:
![MagicAndDungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9574bf7acb2857b94d19b2f1d37ae3a231245045_0.webp)

Welcome to a world where classic survival meets deep magic and perilous adventure! The Magic and Dungeons modpack is designed for those who want to transform Minecraft into a true RPG experience.

# Key Features:
- **Master the Arts**: Harness powerful spells with [_Irons Spellbooks_](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks), discover mystical Artifacts, and craft legendary gear
- **Epic Exploration**: Dive into massive structures from [_When Dungeons Arise_](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), filled with challenging enemies and epic rewards.
- **Vibrant Ecosystem**: Explore breathtaking landscapes with [_Biomes O' Plenty_](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and encounter diverse wildlife from [_Alex's Mobs_](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs(1.21.1)).
- **Smooth Gameplay**: Built on the [_NeoForge_](https://neoforged.net/) engine with a focus on performance, ensuring a stable experience throughout your journey.
# 
Prepare yourself in these lands, magic is as real as the danger lurking around every corner!
